2604.14488.title: Controlling Authority Retrieval: A Missing Retrieval Objective for Authority-Governed Knowledge
2604.14488.paper_summary: In any domain where knowledge accumulates under formal authority -- law, drug regulation, software security -- a later document can formally void an earlier one while remaining semantically distant from it. We formalize this as Controlling Authority Retrieval (CAR): recovering the active frontier front(cl(A_k(q))) of the authority closure of the semantic anchor set -- a different mathematical problem from argmax_d s(q,d). The two central results are: Theorem 4 (CAR-Correctness Characterization) gives necessary-and-sufficient conditions on any retrieved set R for TCA(R,q)=1 -- frontier inclusion and no-ignored-superseder -- independent of how R was produced. Proposition 2 (Scope Identifiability Upper Bound) establishes phi(q) as a hard worst-case ceiling: for any scope-indexed algorithm, TCA@k <= phi(q) * R_anchor(q), proved by an adversarial permutation argument. Three independent real-world corpora validate the proved structure: security advisories (Dense TCA@5=0.270, two-stage 0.975), SCOTUS overruling pairs (Dense=0.172, two-stage 0.926), FDA drug records (Dense=0.064, two-stage 0.774). A GPT-4o-mini experiment shows the downstream cost: Dense RAG produces explicit "not patched" claims for 39% of queries where a patch exists; Two-Stage cuts this to 16%. Four benchmark datasets, domain adapters, and a single-command scorer are released at https://github.com/andremir/car-retrieval.
2604.14488.paper_summary_zh: 在任何知識在正式權威下累積的領域——法律、藥物管制、軟體安全——後續文件可以正式作廢早期文件，同時在語義上與之保持距離。我們將這一過程形式化為控制權威檢索（Controlling Authority Retrieval, CAR）：恢復語義錨點集的權威閉包的主動邊界 front(cl(A_k(q)))——這是一個與 argmax_d s(q,d) 不同的數學問題。兩個核心結果是：定理 4（CAR-正確性特徵）為任何檢索集 R 提供必要且充分的條件，使得 TCA(R,q)=1——邊界包含和無忽略的超越——與 R 的產生方式無關。命題 2（範圍可識別性上限）確立 phi(q) 作為一個嚴格的最壞情況上限：對於任何範圍索引算法，TCA@k <= phi(q) * R_anchor(q)，這是通過對抗性置換論證證明的。三個獨立的真實世界語料庫驗證了所證明的結構：安全建議（Dense TCA@5=0.270，兩階段 0.975）、SCOTUS 推翻對（Dense=0.172，兩階段 0.926）、FDA 藥物記錄（Dense=0.064，兩階段 0.774）。一個 GPT-4o-mini 實驗顯示了下游成本：Dense RAG 為 39% 的查詢產生明確的「未修補」聲明，而這些查詢實際上存在修補；兩階段將此比例減少到 16%。四個基準數據集、領域適配器和一個單指令評分器已在 https://github.com/andremir/car-retrieval 上發布。
2604.14488.author: Andre Bacellar et.al.
